emails.subject: Re: #596722.01
emails.body: Re: #596722.01 This is an index forward, so for round-the-clock deals we enter more than one in order to have peak and off-peak hours settle against the different index prices. 596722 is the off-peak part of this deal, and 596723 is the on-peak part. Let me know if this makes any sense. Thanks, Kate From: Kimberly Indelicato 05/01/2001 02:29 PM
